segments.text: They've got the percentage advantage, but...
segments.original_text: パーセント的には有利ですが
ソニックが掴まれたら
追い抜かれてしまうので

segments.text: Wrath staying calm here as well
segments.original_text: Wrath選手ここでも冷静ですね

segments.text: But with that damage building up...
segments.original_text: しかしパーセントの蓄積によって

segments.text: it's gonna be rough if they don't keep the juggle going
segments.original_text: 浮かせていかないと厳しい

full_text: They've got the percentage advantage, but... if Sonic gets grabbed... they're gonna get overwhelmed Wrath staying calm here as well But with that damage building up... it's gonna be rough if they don't keep the juggle going And there it is!

corrections.original: 不吉していかないとなりやすい
corrections.corrected: 浮かせていかないと厳しい
corrections.rule: misheard: 不吉して→浮かせて
